name: aibrd
description: Structured code review, ADR generation, and design conflict resolution inside Copilot Chat. Uses your org's existing Copilot licence — no extra API keys.

chatParticipants.name: judge
chatParticipants.description: Review code against your team's rubric. Returns APPROVE / REQUEST_CHANGES / BLOCK with severity-graded findings.

commands.name: review
commands.description: Review the active file or selection against the team rubric

commands.name: security
commands.description: Run a security audit (OWASP Top-10 focus)

chatParticipants.name: advocate
chatParticipants.description: Stress-test proposals before committing. Generate Architecture Decision Records.

commands.name: adr
commands.description: Generate an Architecture Decision Record from a proposal

commands.name: devil
commands.description: Devil's Advocate — stress-test a proposal before handing off to agents

chatParticipants.name: mediator
chatParticipants.description: Resolve sprint-blocking engineering disagreements. Finds synthesis, not a winner.

commands.name: design
commands.description: Mediate a design conflict between two engineering positions
